title: Decadent Canadian Cauliflower Dumplings
description: A rich and comforting Canadian-inspired dish that combines the earthiness of cauliflower with the decadence of dumplings.
instructions: 2. Rinse the cauliflower and remove the leaves and stem. Cut it into florets.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, nutritional yeast, salt, black pepper, and dried parsley.
4. Gradually add the melted vegan butter and plant-based milk to the dry ingredients, mixing until a dough forms.
5. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
6. Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
7. Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
8. Place a few cauliflower florets in the center of each circle and fold the dough over to form a half-moon shape.
9. Press the edges together to seal the dumpling and crimp with a fork to prevent it from opening during cooking.
10. Place the dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each dumpling.
11. Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
12. Serve the Canadian cauliflower dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
